commit.message:
Fix VSIX tags: use semicolons instead of commas

VsixPublisher requires semicolon-separated tags. Comma-separated
values are treated as a single tag which exceeds the 50-char limit.

commit.message:
Add `validate_attr=False` metaclass option to skip annotation-driven validation (#28)

* Initial plan

* Add validate_attr metaclass option to AtorsMeta

When validate_attr=False:
- Skip type/value validators and coercers for annotated members
- Still recognize ClassVar (skip as instance member) and Final (read-only/undeletable)
- Fail with ValueError if any member has coerce/coerce_init set (explicit or inherited)

Default behavior (validate_attr=True) is unchanged.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/MatthieuDartiailh/ators/sessions/770bd5cf-925e-4073-be42-261c4de1d958

Co-authored-by: MatthieuDartiailh <4481740+MatthieuDartiailh@users.noreply.github.com>

* tests: fix exception assertion

commit.message:
Initial commit: Add llama-docker router mode server template

- Add comprehensive README.md with setup instructions, configuration guide,
  and usage examples for running llama.cpp in router mode with NVIDIA CUDA
  and AMD Vulkan support
- Include Docker Compose configuration for containerized llama-server with
  GPU acceleration and full model presets support
- Add config.ini with optimized default settings for 24GB VRAM GPUs (RTX 3090)
  with q8_0 K-cache and turbo4 V-cache quantization for best quality/performance
- Include build scripts for TheTom and buun llama.cpp forks with turboquant support
- Add multi-stage Dockerfile for building CUDA-optimized llama-server image
- Include startup/shutdown scripts for easy container management

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
v1.21.10: Fix optimize pack_size false positive + bathroom location

- pack_size only set for genuine multi-packs (N identical separately-sold
  units, e.g. beer 6-pack). Products like cotton swabs 200kpl (one package
  containing 200 pieces) are no longer misidentified as multi-packs.
- Add hygiene/personal care → bathroom to all location assignment prompts
  (both standalone sort and optimize combined prompt).
- Pass current location in product lines sent to AI so it can preserve
  correct existing assignments instead of blindly overriding them.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(release): create universal sidecar binary with lipo for macOS

Tauri --target universal-apple-darwin expects kraki-universal-apple-darwin
sidecar. Use lipo to combine arm64 + x64 binaries.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace dark gradient cards (illegible on light/dark bg) with clean
light-background cards using colored left borders and CSS vars for text.
Each card now uses --global-text-color for title and proper contrast
on both light and dark mode.

commit.message:
fix: dark mode flash and iOS PWA white status bar

Apply dark class to <html> via inline script in <head> before first
paint. Previously the dark class was set in useEffect after React
hydration, causing a white flash and iOS capturing the white state
for the PWA status bar.

Bump arm/web to 0.10.2.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(installer): use explicit GUIDs for multi-file WiX components

WiX v7 rejects Guid='*' when a component has multiple versioned files.
Replace auto-GUID with explicit GUIDs for ComHostComponent and FfmpegComponent.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor(messages): split Auth messages out of Control enum

- What: Move KeyExchangeInit, KeyExchangeReply, SessionTerminated into a
  new Auth enum under node_lib::messages::auth/; strip Control to only
  Heartbeat and HeartbeatReply
- Why: Auth messages have different lifecycle and security semantics from
  routing control messages; separating them improves clarity and enforces
  the rule that algorithm IDs are an internal wire detail
- How: New auth/ module with typed constructors (new_unsigned/new_signed)
  and typed accessors (dh_group(), signing_algorithm()) backed by private
  wire-ID constants; DhGroup/SigningAlgorithm gain wire_id()/from_wire_id()
  methods; removed sig_algo_from_id() from crypto.rs; PacketType::Auth
  gets wire ID 2; all callers in obu_lib, rsu_lib, server_lib updated;
  cloud_protocol::SessionTerminatedForward.sig_algo_id changed to
  sig_algo: Option<SigningAlgorithm>; old control/key_exchange.rs and
  control/session_terminated.rs deleted
- Testing: cargo test --workspace --features test_helpers (all passed),
  cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings (clean),
  cargo build --workspace (clean), cargo fmt (applied)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: vigilant-parakeet
repository.description: Vigilant Parakeet is a Rust-based testbed for researching OBU/RSU vehicular networking. It provides a namespace-based simulator with configurable per-link latency/loss, an HTTP API for runtime control and stats, a visualization frontend, and an extensible node library for protocol and failover experiments.

commit.message:
Exempt FloodAdvert/FloodDemand from global flood dedup

These are peer-specific pull-control messages that must be delivered
per-peer. Stellar-core handles them directly in Peer::recvFloodAdvert
and Peer::recvFloodDemand, not through Floodgate.

Closes #1182

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(prism): v0.2 - 三家族强制阵容 + 对抗角色硬化 + 自评归档

## 变更概要

### 核心修复（Prism v0.1 redteam 自评结论）
- **SKILL.md §5.17**：补充棱镜触发索引（L-17 信息茧房修复）
- **roles/README.md**：升级为三家族模型阵容（Claude/GPT/Gemini/Kimi）+ 三强制对抗角色定义
- **protocol.md**：Schema blind_spots、Dispatch 硬门禁、离散 quorum 表、Synthesis Audit、deadlock 硬终态
- **modes/council.md**：新建（v0.1 遗漏的议事协议文件）

### 记录与归档
- **prism/reports/20260410-redteam-001.md**：第一次 Prism 运行完整报告（Norven 5点质疑→三模型评审→Adjudicate→修复）
- **prism/reports/index.yaml**：写入第一条记录（L-33 Pilot 验证：index.yaml 不再为空）
- **knowledge/lessons.md**：新增 L-32（协议强制≠机器强制）、L-33（先 Pilot 再固化）

## 已知技术债务（v0.3 候选）
- Dispatch Firewall 纸老虎（L-32）：当前仍是 prompt 级约束
- Prism Orchestrator 状态机：强制步骤流转，需 hook 层支持

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Reject cross-phase SCP statement replacement in is_newer_nomination_or_ballot_st

Ballot statements (PREPARE/CONFIRM/EXTERNALIZE) must not replace
nominations and vice-versa. Matches stellar-core Slot.cpp which returns
false when statement types belong to different phases.

Closes #1169

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Cache ledger close times in getEvents to eliminate N+1 queries

HashMap within the response loop.

commit.message:
fix: eliminate 3 remaining limitations

1. Noise filter: user-quote and action-summary patterns added to _is_noise()
   - Catches 'User said/asked/reported/...' checkpoint summaries
   - Catches short past-tense action lines (Fixed/Implemented/Launched/...)
   - Real multi-sentence mistakes still classified correctly
   - Cleaned 169 false positives (36%) from existing DB

2. Sub-agent briefing: --for-subagent flag in briefing.py
   - generate_subagent_context() produces ~200-token [KNOWLEDGE CONTEXT] block
   - Designed for embedding in sub-agent prompts
   - SKILL.md updated with sub-agent injection workflow

3. LaunchAgent: auto-start watcher on macOS login
   - ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.copilot.watch-sessions.plist
   - RunAtLoad + KeepAlive on crash
   - No more manual restart after reboot

Tests: 53 tests in test_fixes.py (all passing)

commit.message:
Fix fee-bump live execution to mutate inner source, not fee source

process_seq_num and process_fee_seq_num now advance the sequence number
on inner_source_account_id() instead of source_account() (fee source).
remove_one_time_signers uses inner source accounts. apply_transaction
does two-pass signer removal for fee bumps: outer hash on fee source,
inner hash on inner sources.

Added TransactionFrame::inner_hash() for computing the inner tx hash.

Closes #1145

commit.message:
Compile agentic workflow markdown files to `.lock.yml` using gh-aw (#257)

* ci: add GitHub Actions YAML for four Copilot agentic workflows

Compile the following .md prompt files into runnable workflow YAML:
- coverage_autofix_every_3_days.yml (schedule every 3 days + workflow_dispatch)
- auto_change_log.yml (release published trigger)
- docs_continuous_improvement_every_3_days.yml (schedule every 3 days + workflow_dispatch)
- auto_release_notes.yml (release published + workflow_dispatch with backfill_all input)

Each YAML:
- Uses github/copilot-coding-agent-action@v1 with prompt_file pointing at its .md
- Sets model: auto from engine.model frontmatter
- Grants contents: write and pull-requests: write as needed
- Implements skip-if-match via a gh pr list pre-flight step (skips agent when an
  open automation PR already exists on the target branch)
- Includes a push: paths: trigger so the workflow re-runs when its own YAML is updated
- Carries over concurrency blocks and timeout-minutes from frontmatter
- Preserves workflow_dispatch inputs (backfill_all) for auto_release_notes

Co-authored-by: carlkidcrypto <27721404+carlkidcrypto@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: add actions/checkout@v4 step to all four agentic workflows

Both gh pr list (without --repo flag) and github/copilot-coding-agent-action
with prompt_file require the repository to be checked out in the workspace.
Add actions/checkout@v4 as the first step in each job.

Co-authored-by: carlkidcrypto <27721404+carlkidcrypto@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci(auto_release_notes): fix backfill_all input type and pass to agent

- Use type: boolean with unquoted default: false for the workflow_dispatch
  backfill_all input
- Expose the input value as BACKFILL_ALL env var on the Copilot agent step
  so the agent can read it from its environment when deciding run mode

Co-authored-by: carlkidcrypto <27721404+carlkidcrypto@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: cosmetic fix and input fallback for release trigger

- coverage_autofix_every_3_days.yml: add blank line after name for style consistency
- auto_release_notes.yml: use inputs.backfill_all || 'false' so BACKFILL_ALL
  is always a defined string on release: published triggers where inputs context
  is not available

Co-authored-by: carlkidcrypto <27721404+carlkidcrypto@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: compile agentic workflow markdown files to .lock.yml using gh-aw v0.68.0

commit.message:
Add custom agents, config-authoring skill, and hooks

Agents (.github/agents/):
- config-author: creates/edits lab config JSON against schema
- workload-developer: develops modules with deploy/remove symmetry
- lab-operator: runs deploys/teardowns, troubleshoots failures

Skills (.github/skills/config-authoring/):
- Step-by-step guide for creating new config JSON from scratch

Hooks (.github/hooks/):
- preToolUse: blocks edits to manifests/ and logs/ (auto-generated)
- postToolUse: auto-lints .psm1/.ps1 files after edits

Also improved copilot-instructions.md:
- Added ConditionalAccess/AuditConfig to module list
- Added Copilot DLP deployment track
- Added error isolation and auth flow sections
- Added DLP parameter detection specifics
- Fixed cloud resolution chain

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: purview-lab-deployer

commit.message:
ux: redesign sell analysis horizon picker — unified dual-label chips

Replace parallel duration-presets + month-chips (two competing paradigms)
with a single cohesive chip group. Each preset chip shows both dimensions:

  - Top line: relative duration (1 miesiąc / 1 kwartał / 6 miesięcy / 1 rok)
  - Bottom line: concrete target month (dynamically computed from today)

A 5th 'Własny' chip expands an inline row of the next 8 calendar months
(each also labeled with ~N mies. duration). Selecting a custom month
closes the picker and activates the custom chip showing the chosen month.

Result: one selection, zero ambiguity — duration and calendar month are
always visible together, not as competing alternatives.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add min-confidence filter to briefing.py

- search_knowledge_entries() and search_semantic() accept min_confidence param
- generate_briefing() defaults to min_confidence=0.5 (filters noisy entries)
- CLI: --min-confidence <float> to customize, --all to show everything
- Sort results by confidence DESC before rank
- Previously 84% of entries had confidence < 0.7, producing noisy briefings
